entities.description: h is a parameter used to specify the mqtt server in the command line interface
p is a parameter used to specify the mqtt server port in the command line interface
t is a parameter used to specify the mqtt topic  which can be named arbitrarily  in the command line interface
m is a parameter used to specify the mqtt message to be published in the command line interface
mqtt is a protocol used for messaging  with parameters such as server  port  mode  topic  and message specified in the command line interface

relations.description: h is a parameter related to the mqtt server  specifying its address
p is a parameter related to the mqtt protocol  specifying the server port
m is a parameter related to the mqtt protocol  specifying the operation mode  publish or subscribe
t is a parameter related to the mqtt protocol  specifying the topic for message transmission
